Mtn For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Americah Express Centurion Bank, Utah State Chartered Bank.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Frederick Schroeffel, an individual.
DefAult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $57,045.63
Pre-Judgment Interest and Attorney's Fees are waived
Costs: $506.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $57,552.58
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
